title: I Conquer The World With Words
content:
I conquer the world with words,
conquer the mother tongue,
verbs, nouns, syntax.
I sweep away the beginning of things
and with a new language
that has the music of water the message of fire
I light the coming age
and stop time in your eyes
and wipe away the line
that separates
time from this single moment.
meaning:
About: Nizar Tawfiq Qabbani (21 March 1923 � 30 April 1998) was a Syrian diplomat, poet and publisher. 
His poetic style combines simplicity and elegance in exploring themes of love, eroticism, feminism, religion, and Arab nationalism. 
He is one of the most revered contemporary poets in the Arab world.
